payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Dark stained wooden side table with a small top drawer over a paneled cabinet door, round metal knobs and carved molding; glossy finish with visible wear and small objects on the top surface; the piece is slightly edge-cropped in the image and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).
